summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MealTalks landing page iteration 5 fixes. All requirements successfully verified: App Store buttons text alignment with whitespace-nowrap at all screen sizes, Habits and AI sections each show single phone with blob backgrounds, footer has cream background with dot pattern, responsive layout works correctly.
passed_tests: App Store/Google Play buttons text never wraps at 1920px, 768px, 390px screen widths
Habits section shows single phone image (3.png) with Vector 3 blob background
AI section shows single phone image (4.png) with Vector 4 blob background
Footer has dark dot pattern in top-right corner
Hero section maintains combined double phone image with blob
All images load correctly (3.png, 4.png, Vector 3.png, Vector 4.png)
Responsive layout works at desktop, tablet, and mobile sizes
Button text alignment uses whitespace-nowrap and flex-shrink-0 classes correctly
Footer App Store buttons also maintain proper alignment on mobile
